Record Class SaleService.Sale

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.novastack.iposca.sales.SaleService.Sale
Record Components:
saleID - The ID of the sale.
customerID - The ID of the customer who made the sale.
paymentMethod - The payment method used for the sale.
cardVendor - The vendor of the credit card used for the sale.
cardFirst4 - The first 4 digits of the credit card used for the sale.
cardLast4 - The last 4 digits of the credit card used for the sale.
cardExp - The expiration date of the credit card used for the sale.
saleDateTime - The date and time of the sale.
saleAmount - The total amount of the sale.
Enclosing class:
SaleService
public static record SaleService.Sale(Integer saleID, Integer customerID, String paymentMethod, String cardVendor, String cardFirst4, String cardLast4, YearMonth cardExp, LocalDateTime saleDateTime, float saleAmount) extends Record
This record is a data class that represents a sale.

  • Constructor Details

    • Sale

      public Sale(Integer saleID, Integer customerID, String paymentMethod, String cardVendor, String cardFirst4, String cardLast4, YearMonth cardExp, LocalDateTime saleDateTime, float saleAmount)
      Creates an instance of a Sale record class.
      Parameters:
      saleID - the value for the saleID record component
      customerID - the value for the customerID record component
      paymentMethod - the value for the paymentMethod record component
      cardVendor - the value for the cardVendor record component
      cardFirst4 - the value for the cardFirst4 record component
      cardLast4 - the value for the cardLast4 record component
      cardExp - the value for the cardExp record component
      saleDateTime - the value for the saleDateTime record component
      saleAmount - the value for the saleAmount record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
